subject: Fix Sdc configuration
commit_message:
Fix Sdc configuration

Fixing the SdcConfiguration class to accomodate the
parameter for switching http vs https communication
between Sdc client & server. So that distribution component
is compatible with Service Mesh (Istio) initiative in OOM.

For more details - https://jira.onap.org/browse/POLICY-4226

Issue-ID: POLICY-4226
Change-Id: Ia3956832d37953e1b6149303ca685d4b82c30f5d
Signed-off-by: Ram Krishna Verma <ram_krishna.verma@bell.ca>

Hi Pam, this seems to be a requirement coming from Service Mesh (Istio) work going on in OOM.

probably will need to add flag in OOM distribution chart side too, Ram?

exactly, we will have to update the config here - https://github.com/onap/oom/blob/master/kubernetes/policy/components/policy-distribution/resources/config/config.json

Probably, this can go with the version change, when we are ready with our interim K images. What do you say?
